title: <div>Upon completion of this course, students will achieve the following learnin
content:
Upon completion of this course, students will achieve the following learning outcomes:

Learning Outcome 1: Inquiry and Formulation of Questions
- Formulate Questions: Students will be able to develop clear, focused, and researchable questions based on an initial exploration of a topic.
- Understand Inquiry Contexts: Recognize and articulate the context and significance of different types of questions within various academic disciplines.

Learning Outcome 2: Development of Academic Arguments
- Construct Arguments: Create coherent and structured arguments supported by evidence.
- Evaluate Evidence: Critically assess and select appropriate evidence to support arguments.

Learning Outcome 3: Critical Reading and Interpretation
- Analyze Texts: Demonstrate the ability to analyze and interpret complex texts and media to understand their meaning and implications.
- Synthesize Information: Integrate insights gained from various sources into a comprehensive understanding of the topic.

Learning Outcome 4: Research Skills
